text.message: Green getting 9 5 10 with unlimited wheat would be so funny
i think red needs to take it
nothing is really good for you
I think if black had taken the 8 5 10 then the wheat pile makes sense for you tbh
Because nothing else looked any good
green got a wheat from me obv
so they are already close to settle
Needs two wheat for that, and they did buy a dev
yeah but they knight me for another wheat
If we keep the ore open then it could be traded
Just saying since you have a lot of wheat
Actually you might need sheep black
Everyone looks good but us red hehe
lol how do I look good? Wheatless games are so bad
True, just mean right now red and I haven't done much
Curious rob black, may I inquire why?
we have to blocks 4 brick to have any chance
I tend to rob those who are ahead but that's interesting to be robbed twice
sorry for double rob, i just think you're ahead of green
green doesn't produce wheat and i plowed them
Ur gonna have such good ows black
Currently, I am very far from this
And clearly the ore is easily blocked
you just gave him a city
Looks like it was city for city
has to stay on the 4 ideally
Black has wood port so srry red that’s ideally where it stays
so we all see green is on 7 now right?
Do u rlly think I keep road? Lmao
Black just be prepared for the tricky nature of the fact that you both have no overlapping tiles
but i dont think i dev that much w no sheep and 3 ore
I don't think green is currently too close to win
Will change my tune if evidence warrants it
i mean they are about to be on 8 points while we are on 234
Again I do not keep road… in no way keep me on 7 points
Perhaps, I only wanted a guaranteed ore, sorry green
Needed to city and start doing something
That’s fair would of traded for nb tbh
Good to know, try not to extort too much
Green can I do add a future wheat for this trade?
I only have 1 wood srry no
Can make one once i settle
blue i wouldnt have done it if you didnt
Red I need a brick hahaha
we cant bow down to blk
Red, look at my position haha
green is on 8 and you're trading them?
Green and black with no overlap is unfortunate
Red can you try for road?
How do you ever put it on the 8
With a competitor on 8 or 9, as you said
help with road pls and all your problems will disappear
I will mentally check out now that everyone is devving
3 roll is both great and terrible
I am baffled that I was ever robbed still
Black on 9 with army this turn
yeah wasn't the right rob, my bad
Red if you know you're taking road, then one consideration can be to block the other guy preemptively
you know what i mean red?
Maybe not blk might struggle to settle
He’s definitely pulling for one tho
i'm not close to win, i need a lot to road settle
Or u pull vp black… lol u probly in lead
Coulda been robbing green, black! best of luck all
i have to block green now
